name: FEMLab.jl Codespace
updateContentCommand: mkdir -p ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/.julia-depot && julia --startup-file=no --project=${containerWorkspaceFolder} -e 'using Pkg; println("DEPOT_PATH = ", DEPOT_PATH); Pkg.instantiate(); Pkg.precompile(); using FEMLab; println("First FEMLab load completed during prebuild."); using FEMLab, LinearAlgebra, SparseArrays; println("FEMLab prebuild ready.")'
